title: Semiconductor package
abstract: A semiconductor package (1, 42), the package (1, 42) comprising a semiconductor element (2) comprising a first electric contact surface (16) on a first side (14) and a second electric contact surface (17) on a second side (15) opposite to the first side (14), and a cap (3) comprising a first side (6) and a second side (7) opposite to the first side (6), a cavity (9) which is located at the first side (6) of the cap (3) and has a bottom wall (10) and side walls (1 1, 12) and which is dimensioned to receive the semiconductor element (2), and a first conductive path (23) forming a first electric contact surface (20) located at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9), wherein the semiconductor element (2) is fixed within the cavity (9), wherein the first electric contact surface (16) at the first side (14) of the semiconductor elÂ¬ ement (2) and the first electric contact surface (20) at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) are electrically conductive bonded in a material-locking manner.
claims:
Claims Claims A semiconductor package (1 , 42), the package (1 , 42) comprising: a semiconductor element (2) comprising a first electric contact surface (16) on a first side (14) and a second electric contact surface (17) on a second side (15) opposite to the first side (14), and a cap (3) comprising a first side (6) and a second side (7) opposite to the first side (6), a cavity (9) which is located at the first side (6) of the cap (3) and has a bottom wall (10) and side walls (1 1 , 12) and which is dimensioned to receive the semiconductor element (2), and a first conductive path (23) forming a first electric contact surface (20) located at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9), wherein the semiconductor element (2) is fixed within the cavity (9), wherein the first electric contact surface (16) at the first side (14) of the semiconductor element (2) and the first electric contact surface (20) at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) are electrically conductive bonded in a material-locking manner. The semiconductor element (1 , 42) of claim 1 , wherein the total height (HC) of the cavity (9) matches the total height (HS) of the semiconductor element (2) so that the second side (15) of the semiconductor element (2) is aligned with the first side (6) of the cap (3) outside of the cavity (9). The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of claim 1 or 2, further comprising at the first side (6) of the cap a closed ring like structure (33) surrounding the cavity (9), the ring like structure (33) comprising a layer (32) of a material that is adapted for connecting the cap (3) to a substrate (4) in a material-locking manner. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of claim 3, wherein the ring like structure (33) comprises a layer (32) of a solderable material (30), particularly a metal or an alloy. 5. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of the preceding claims, wherein the semiconductor element (2) further comprises a third electric contact surface (18) on the first side (14) which is electrically isolated from the first electric contact surface (16) on the first side (14), wherein the cap (3) further comprises a second conductive path (24) forming a second electric contact surface (22) located at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) which is electrically isolated from the first electric contact surface (16) located at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9), and wherein the third electric contact surface (18) at the first side (14) of the semiconductor element (2) and the second electric contact surface (22) at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) are electrically conductive bonded in a material-locking manner. 6. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of the preceding claims, wherein the first conductive path (23) extends between the first electric contact surface (20) located at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) and a third electric contact surface (25) located at the first side (6) of the cap (3) outside of the cavity (9) and/or wherein the second conductive path (24) extends between the second electric contact surface (24) located at the inner side of the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) and a fourth electric contact surface (26) located at the first side (6) of the cap (3) outside of the cavity (9). 7. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of the preceding claims, wherein at least one portion of at least one of the first conductive path (23) and the second conductive path (24) is attached to the inner side of at least one of the side walls (1 1 , 12) of the cavity (9). 8. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of the preceding claims, wherein at least one portion of at least one of the first conductive path (23) and the second conductive path (24) comprises a via (43, 44) through the bottom wall (10) of the cavity (9) of the cap (3) and wherein at least one other por- 

 tion of at least one of the first conductive path (23) and the second conductive path (24) comprises a via (45, 46) through the cap outside of the cavity. 9. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of the preceding claims, wherein the material of the cap (3) comprises silicon or ceramics. 10. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of the preceding claims, wherein the semiconductor element (2) is one of a Diode, a Diac, a Triac, a Thyris- tor, a transistor, an IGBT and a MOSFET. 1 1 . The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of any of claims 2 to 10, wherein the cap (3) is placed onto a substrate (4), wherein the ring like structure (33) is bonded to the substrate (4) in a material-locking manner, and wherein the semiconductor element (2) is hermetically encapsulated within the cavity (9) of the cap (3). 12. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of claim 1 1 , wherein the substrate (4) further comprises disjunct metallization areas (36, 37, 38) and wherein the second electric contact surface (17) at the second side (15) of the semiconductor element (2) and at least one of the metallization areas (36, 37, 38) are electrically conductive bonded in a material-locking manner. 13. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of claim 12, wherein at least one of the third electric contact surface (25) and the fourth electric contact surface (26) at the first side (6) of the cap (3) is electrically conductive bonded to at least one of the metallization areas (36, 37, 38) in a material-locking manner. 14. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of claim 12 or 13, wherein the ring like structure (33) and at least one of the metallization areas (36, 37, 38) are bonded in a material-locking manner. 15. The semiconductor package (1 , 42) of claim 14, wherein a bonding structure (34) which connects the ring like structure (33) and at least one of the metallization areas (36, 37, 38) comprises an electrically isolating layer (40)
